headline: Teledyne Boson SX8 Launch Puts Focus On Defense Growth Potential
summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) has introduced the Boson SX8, a high-definition, NDAA-compliant thermal camera module. The Boson SX8 is described as the first uncooled longwave infrared camera with SXGA (1280 × 1024) resolution and an 8-micron pixel in a compact, mass-produced format. The module is designed for defense, security, and industrial uses, including uncrewed systems, perimeter security, and intelligence operations. The product is ITAR-free and NDAA-compliant, aligning with U.S...
